title: Oliver!
writer: Lionel Bart, Vernon Harris, Charles Dickens

plot: After being sold to the mortician Sowerberry, young orphan Oliver Twist runs away and meets a group of boys trained to be pickpockets by their elderly mentor Fagin in 1830s London in this musical based on Charles Dickens' Oliver T...
